Detected Solution Path

  1. Defeat 1 Nexar Commander lvl 110.

Quest Text

Description

Operative Smith: We have identified an enemy commander, whom we believe is in charge of the invading force. Take him out and maybe they will retreat back...

Completion

Operative Smith: Seems like their ranks are disoriented for now. But there is still no sign of a withdrawal... We have to think of something else.
